# unifi_radius_profiles (Data Source)

All RADIUS profiles on the site. Use it to resolve a RADIUS profile's UUID by name to attach to a WPA-Enterprise SSID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve a RADIUS profile's UUID by name to attach to a WPA-Enterprise SSID.
data "unifi_radius_profiles" "all" {}

locals {
  corp_radius_id = one([
    for p in data.unifi_radius_profiles.all.radius_profiles : p.id
    if p.name == "corp-radius"
  ])
}

output "corp_radius_profile_id" {
  value = local.corp_radius_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `radius_profiles` (Attributes List) The RADIUS profiles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--radius_profiles))

<a id="nestedatt--radius_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `radius_profiles`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) RADIUS profile UUID.
- `name` (String) RADIUS profile name.
